title: Missing 'Add Filter' button in Google Sheets node
symptom: After upgrading to n8n version 1.90.2, the 'Add Filter' button is missing from the Google Sheets node's Get Rows functionality. This issue also affects other nodes like Form.
not_this_if: The button is present in older workflows
root_cause: The issue arises from a bug introduced in n8n version 1.90.2 that causes certain controls within nodes to disappear. This affects the usability of nodes like Google Sheets and Form, leading to missing functionalities.
fix_steps: Check the Google Sheets node again for the 'Add Filter' button
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.91.0 to restore the missing controls in nodes.
